author: doll-agent
content: Added function-form r_() / c_() to ferray-core::manipulation. r_(arrays) concatenates 1-D arrays into 1-D; c_(arrays) stacks 1-D arrays as columns of a 2-D array. NumPy's r_/c_ rely on Python's __getitem__ slice-tuple protocol which Rust syntax cannot replicate; the ferray-core-macros crate already provides the s! slice-builder macro for the index_exp use case. Re-exported at top level via ferray crate. 4 unit tests.
